archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Aviation/Government Enterprise

layout_and_spacing.app_container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] bg-slate-50 flex flex-col relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden

components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-4
components.button_primary: w-full bg-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#1E40AF] text-white font-bold py-3.5 px-4 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
components.button_secondary: w-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-800 font-semibold py-3.5 px-4 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
components.input: w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-right text-slate-900 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0EA5E9] focus:border-[#0EA5E9] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400
components.bottom_tab: absolute bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center h-16 px-2 z-50
components.header: bg-white border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-40
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

icons.usage_notes: Use lucide-react. Ensure direction-specific icons (like ChevronRight) are logically aligned for RTL (Right-to-Left). Typically, 'back' is a ChevronRight in RTL.

images.description: Airport control tower for the login screen background or top hero section
Aviation blue sky with airplane for header accents or profile backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set `<html dir='rtl'>` in index.html to enforce Arabic Right-to-Left alignment globally.

Simulate a mobile app: Wrap the main routes in a `<div className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] bg-slate-50 flex flex-col relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden'>`. This ensures it looks like an Expo app even in a desktop browser.
Import 'Tajawal' and 'Cairo' fonts from Google Fonts in index.css. Apply 'font-sans' mapping to Tajawal for headings and Cairo for body in tailwind.config.js.
Implement bottom tab navigation (fixed at bottom of the max-w-md container) for quick switching between Dashboard, Reports, Activities, and Profile.
Brand Identity: Create a placeholder GCAAN Logo (blue circular with an aviation tower & wings) using an SVG or Lucide icons stacked.
Designer Credit: Add 'تصميم المهندس معاد كاظم' (Designed by Eng. Muaad Kazim) subtly in the Login or Profile footer.
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-btn"`, `data-testid="activity-card-1"`).
Approval Workflow: Color code status badges heavily. Amber for pending, Emerald for approved, Red for rejected. Show approval timeline visually.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tabs, Select, and Dialogs, but adapt their styles to have generous border-radius (rounded-xl) and RTL compatibility.
